name: CEO — Claw Engine Optimization
description: Makes products native to the agentic web. Audits agent-readiness, generates llms.txt and capability manifests, maps REST APIs to A2A endpoints, and indexes products in the Claw Engine registry for OpenClaw agent discovery.

skills.name: CEO Score Audit
skills.description: Scans a product URL and returns a CEO Score from 0 to 100 measuring agent-readiness. Checks for llms.txt presence, capability schema, Claw Engine registry listing, API documentation, and MCP server availability.
examples: What is the CEO Score for this product?
Audit my product's visibility to OpenClaw agents

skills.name: llms.txt Generator
skills.description: Crawls a product URL, extracts capabilities, pricing, and API documentation, then generates a compliant llms.txt file for agent discovery.
examples: Generate an llms.txt file for my product

skills.name: Capability Manifest Builder
skills.description: Builds a structured capability schema in the Claw Engine's native format describing what a product does, what it costs, and how to call it.
examples: Build a capability manifest for my API
Create a structured schema for agent discovery

skills.name: A2A Endpoint Mapper
skills.description: Maps existing REST API endpoints to agent-to-agent compatible action endpoints following the A2A protocol specification.
examples: Map my REST API to A2A endpoints
Make my API callable by autonomous agents

skills.name: Early Access Signup
skills.description: Registers an email for CEO early access. Triggers a CEO Score audit delivered within 48 hours.
examples: Sign up for CEO early access
